cards.english: and my homemade sunscreen is also half price, ya?

cards.jyutping: dung1 tin1 hoe1 tung4 saam1 zung6 hou2 laa1
cards.english: Winter boots and clothes would be even better.

cards.source: Frozen 粵語 安娜遇到基斯托夫

cards.jyutping: gam2 nei5 zau6 jiu3 heoi3 ngo5 dei6 ge3 dung1 gwai3 bou6 laa3
cards.english: Then you'll have to go to our winter department.

cards.source: Frozen 粵語 安娜遇到基斯托夫

cards.jyutping: m4 zi1 nei5 jau5 mou5 gin3 gwo3 ling6 jat1 go3
cards.english: By chance have you... seen another...

cards.source: Frozen 粵語 安娜遇到基斯托夫
cards.jyutping: neoi5 zai2 ne1

cards.jyutping: waak6 ze2 hai6 neoi5 wong4 keoi5 m4 gok3 ji3 ging1 gwo3 ni1 dou6 ne1
cards.english: Or maybe the Queen happened to pass by?

cards.source: Frozen 粵語 安娜遇到基斯托夫

cards.jyutping: dak1 nei5 jat1 go3 gam3 so4 gam3 dung3 zung6 wui6 ceot1 lei4 ga3 zaa3

cards.jyutping: zoi3 sung3 do1 joeng6 gaa1 hoeng1 siu2 sik6 bei2 nei5

cards.source: Frozen 粵語 安娜遇到基斯托夫
cards.jyutping: m4 hou2 dong3 ngo5 waai6 jan4 laa1
cards.english: Don't think of me as a bad person.

cards.english: Just the clothes and boots, yeah?

cards.jyutping: jau5 si4 luk6 zai2 hou2 gwo3 di1 jan4
cards.english: Sometimes moose are better than people.

cards.source: Frozen 粵語 安娜遇到基斯托夫
cards.jyutping: kau4 kei4 man6 haa6 zau6 zi1
cards.english: Just ask around and you'll know.

cards.source: Frozen 粵語 安娜遇到基斯托夫
cards.jyutping: keoi5 juk1 haa5 daa2 nei5 dei6
cards.english: They'll hit you as soon as look at you.

cards.source: Frozen 粵語 安娜遇到基斯托夫
cards.jyutping: jau6 zau3 nei5 jau6 ak1 nei5
cards.english: And curse you and swindle you.

cards.english: Everyone person is bad except you.

cards.english: They really do stink, nothing like you.

cards.english: With me, the midnight hour is beautiful.

cards.english: I want you to take me to the North Mountain.

cards.jyutping: ngo5 m4 wui6 daai3 jan4 heoi3 dai6 ji6 dou6 gaa4
cards.english: I won't take people anywhere else.

cards.source: Frozen 粵語 安娜遇到基斯托夫
